---
title: "Support"
description: "Where to get help with UIAO — rendered from the canonical SUPPORT.md at the repo root."
categories: [meta]
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Canonical source
This page renders the canonical
[`SUPPORT.md`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/SUPPORT.md)
at the repository root.
:::

{{< include ../../SUPPORT.md >}}
